languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

languages.text: "Сырость плохо влияет на металлические части Глейто. После этого места мне придется провести полную ревизию протоколов".
languages.translation_comment: characters landed on a planet where it is raining heavily, everything around is wet

languages.text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."
languages.original_text: "Сырость плохо влияет на металлические части Глейто. После этого места мне придется провести полную ревизию протоколов".

traits.locale_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."
"Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."
"Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

languages.text: 「湿った環境は、グレイトの金属部品にとって良くない。この場所を離れたら、彼のプロトコルを完全に検査しなければならない」
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: 「湿った環境は、グレイトの金属部品にとって良くない。この場所を離れたら、彼のプロトコルを完全に検査しなければならない。」

languages.text: « L'humidité est mauvaise pour les composants métalliques de Glaito. Il faudra que je procède à une inspection complète de ses protocoles une fois que nous aurons quitté cet endroit. »
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: « L'humidité est mauvaise pour les composants métalliques de Glaito. Il faudra que je procède à une inspection complète de ses protocoles une fois que nous aurons quitté cet endroit. »

languages.text: "Feuchte Bedingungen sind für Glaitos Metallkomponenten nicht gut. Ich werde eine vollständige Inspektion seiner Protokolle vornehmen, sobald wir diesen Ort verlassen."
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: "Feuchte Bedingungen sind für Glaitos Metallkomponenten nicht gut. Ich werde eine vollständige Inspektion seiner Protokolle vornehmen, sobald wir diesen Ort verlassen."

languages.text: "Islak koşullar, Glaito'nun metal bileşenleri için iyi değil. Buradan ayrıldığımızda protokollerini tam bir denetimden geçirmem gerekecek."
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: "Islak koşullar, Glaito'nun metal bileşenleri için iyi değil. Buradan ayrıldığımızda protokollerini tam bir denetimden geçirmem gerekecek."

languages.text: «Las condiciones de humedad son perjudiciales para los componentes de metal de Glaito. Tendré que llevar a cabo una inspección completa de sus protocolos cuando nos marchemos de aquí».
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: «Las condiciones de humedad son perjudiciales para los componentes de metal de Glaito. Tendré que llevar a cabo una inspección completa de sus protocolos cuando nos marchemos de aquí».

languages.text: “潮湿环境对格雷托的金属部件有害。离开此地后，我需要对他的协议进行全面检查。”
languages.original_text: "Wet conditions are not good for Glaito's metal components. I will have to do a complete inspection of his protocols once we leave this place."

traits.locale_text: “潮湿环境对格雷托的金属部件有害。离开此地后，我需要对他的协议进行全面检查。”
